name: lmfaole
description: Learning resource for design systems and UI patterns.

scripts.test: npm run lint && npm run test:commit:run && npm run test:unit && npm run test:browser
scripts.test:browser: npm run build && npm run test:browser:run
scripts.test:browser:run: npm run browser:ensure && start-server-and-test "astro preview --host 127.0.0.1 --port 3001" http://127.0.0.1:3001 "npm run test:search:run && npm run test:routes:run && npm run test:a11y:run && npm run test:lighthouse:run"
scripts.test:a11y: npm run build && npm run test:a11y:built
scripts.test:a11y:built: npm run browser:ensure && start-server-and-test "astro preview --host 127.0.0.1 --port 3001" http://127.0.0.1:3001 "npm run test:a11y:run"
scripts.test:lighthouse: npm run build && npm run test:lighthouse:built
scripts.test:lighthouse:built: npm run browser:ensure && start-server-and-test "astro preview --host 127.0.0.1 --port 3001" http://127.0.0.1:3001 "npm run test:lighthouse:run"
scripts.lint: npm run typecheck && npm run lint:styles && npm run lint:repo
scripts.pages:dev: npm run build && npx wrangler pages dev dist
scripts.pages:deploy: npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=lmfaole
